title: Pages Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 2 — populated pages family schema. Site-page declarations from Contract §13 covering the 17 standard pages (9 MVP + 8 Future): shell pages, module pages, and the governance Settings page. Every page record represents a PCC-facing page or route — never a native SharePoint admin / edit / settings surface (VR-17 no-native-SharePoint-admin posture). Pages reference modules by stable identifier (VR-26 referential integrity). Field set traces verbatim to fields/families/pages.fields.json. mvp_status binds to the canonical Decision Closure four-value enum (VR-24). Navigation order is governed by Control Center Settings (§10) at runtime.

pageUrl.description: Page URL path under /SitePages/ (e.g., /SitePages/Project-Control-Center.aspx). 17 §13 standard pages. PCC-facing pages only — page records MUST NOT represent native SharePoint admin, edit, or settings surfaces (VR-17). The PCC governance Settings page (/SitePages/Settings.aspx) is a PCC-facing settings surface, not a native SharePoint admin screen.

embeddedModule.description: Module embedded in this page; references modules family by stable identifier. VR-26 referential integrity.

defaultOrder.description: Default navigation order (1–17). Navigation order ultimately governed by Control Center Settings (§10) at runtime.

visibility.description: Page visibility (e.g., All, Phase managers + Admin, All operational). VR-07 module visibility may further restrict per ProjectStage.

mvpStatus.description: Decision Closure status. 9 MVP pages 'Frozen for MVP'; 8 Future pages 'Deferred'. VR-24.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Canonical Decision Closure Register status — VR-24.
